summary: Malaysia public-only skeleton for open-data discovery and bounded registry-source planning. It does not expose SSM e-Info company profiles, directors, shareholders, charges, financials, or hosted monitoring without authorised SSM terms.

auth.notes: The skeleton has no live credentialed adapter. SSM e-Info, MyData-SSM, Corporate Integration Data, or equivalent authorised channels must define any future MY_API_* credentials before profile retrieval.

licensing.notes: data.gov.my can support open-data discovery. SSM company-profile, business-profile, charges, financial comparison, watch, API, and bulk use require approved SSM terms before redistribution or hosted commercial use.

freshness.refreshCadence: manual source review until a permitted adapter exists

publicDataLimits.message: This pack documents Malaysia source boundaries and does not perform a live SSM company-profile lookup.
Do not fetch, cache, redistribute, or resell SSM profile, ownership, director, charge, or financial data without authorised SSM terms.
Outputs are public-source planning artifacts and not legal, tax, credit, investment, or licensed compliance advice.

tools.name: my_public_registry_brief
tools.purpose: Document Malaysia public-source availability, SSM paid-data boundaries, and next steps for a user-supplied company name or registration number.

publicDataLimits.message: The skeleton may cite source boundaries but must not return SSM company-profile, officer, shareholder, charge, or financial rows.

expectedGaps.message: Authoritative SSM profile retrieval requires an approved SSM e-Info, MyData-SSM, Corporate Integration Data, or equivalent licensed channel.

contributionNotes: Confirm SSM terms for automated access, caching, attribution, redistribution, commercial hosted use, and bulk monitoring before adding live adapters.
Use MY_API_* environment variables for any future credentials; never reuse SG_API_* names.
Add recorded-source tests for public open-data discovery, paid-profile blocked paths, no-match, ambiguous-match, and upstream failure.
Preserve provenance, freshness, gaps, and limits in every output.
